rationale: Section 26.07 governs automatic tax-rate elections for non-school taxing units and references the voter-approval tax rate without referencing homestead exemption amounts. Increasing the §11.13(b) exemption indirectly affects the tax base but does not conflict with this section's operative provisions.
quote: This section applies to a taxing unit other than a school district.
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed exemption increase may indirectly affect voter-approval tax rate calculations referenced by §26.07, but those calculations are defined in other provisions (e.g., §26.012).
